setting_statement: The frontier is the long ragged edge where law thins out and the old things wait. Out here, ships are homes, fuel is faith, and every derelict station hides somebody else's bad day. The big alien wrecks in the deep dark were here before us and they will be here after, and they are listening.

pillars.title: Community under pressure
pillars.description: The crew is the campaign. Strangers on the same ship eventually become family or kill each other; both outcomes matter.

pillars.title: The cost of freedom
pillars.description: Out here you are nobody's pet, and nobody is coming to help you. Independence has a fuel bill, and the bill comes due.

pillars.title: What the old ones left behind
pillars.description: The deep dark holds wrecks and ruins from minds that did not think like ours. Touching them changes you, and not always physically.

pillars.title: Blue-collar heroism
pillars.description: These are not chosen ones. They are pilots, mechanics, scoundrels, and tired professionals making the right call when nobody is watching.

content_to_include: the texture of frontier labor and trade
alien artifacts that are wondrous and dangerous
